# performFindPanelAction(_:)

**Instance Method**

An action method that opens the Find menu and Find panel.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func performFindPanelAction(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object that sent this message.

## Discussion

This method behaves similar to the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit/NSTextView/performFindPanelAction(_:)] method in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit/NSTextView].
